calculus_tests.details: All null pointer checks and negative value checks passed

communication_tests.details: AllGather test passed, Transpose test failed with segmentation fault (placeholder implementation limitation)

workarounds_applied.issue: Missing MPI C++ bindings in OpenMPI
Missing kutacc_core library with BF16 GEMM functions
MPI header files in non-standard location

limitations: BF16 GEMM functions are placeholder implementations - actual performance requires Huawei HPCKit
KuPL communication functions are stubs - real MPI functionality requires Huawei proprietary libraries
SVE and BF16 CPU features not utilized - would need 毕昇 compiler for optimal performance
Transpose communication test fails due to incomplete placeholder implementation

conclusion.summary: Successfully built kutacc library without modifying source code. All calculus tests (54/54) passed. Communication tests partially passed (1/2). The build uses placeholder implementations for proprietary Huawei libraries (KuPL, kutacc_core). For production use with full functionality, Huawei HPCKit with 毕昇 compiler and proprietary libraries is required.
